creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text: I found bug #256078 also updates this port to 2.9.12. But it also changes build tool from GNU autotools to CMake. And submitter says it is still WIP. On the other hands, Update to 2.9.12 includes fix of CVE-2021-3541. So my patch should be committed ASAP rather than waiting for working of bug #256078 will be finished.
